title: alchemilla vulgaris f. straminea
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris f. straminea, also known as the yellow lady's mantle, is a variety of the common lady's mantle plant characterized by its yellow flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include soothing irritated skin, reducing swelling, and aiding in the healing of wounds. The herbal preparations of alchemilla vulgaris f. straminea typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
